prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1703→1835→3862→4129→5277名，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3415名，2025年基准约5277名；该校在吉林 省物理类招生计划2021–2023年22人，2024年24人，2025年25人，2026年24人，较2025年小幅缩招4%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，属于中上水平211；2026年高考周期声誉数据中该校未出现明显负面或正面事件；抖音综合热度 排名第91，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A类学科 ，在财经类院校中学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类2024年专业热度评估为"分化观望"，较2023 年小幅升温，财经类专业报考意愿有所回暖；吉林省2026年高考总报名约110868人，物理类考生约79980人，较2025年80421人略降约0.5%，竞争规模基本稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5277名、2026年计划小幅缩招（加剧竞争）、考生总数略降、财经类专业热度小幅回暖等因素，预计2026年物理类最低 录取位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略缓解），预测最低位次约5230名，区间4730–5730名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工商管理类（会计学、财务管理、人力资源管理、市场营销、工商管理，含联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 金融工程（大类招生）（金融工程、金融科技，含联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（大类招生）（含数据科学与大数据技术、智能科学与技术、人工智能（项目制培养），含双学士学位项目选拔）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 金融工程（量化金融实验班）
- 金融数学
- 经济学（荣誉学士实验班）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（4730–5730名）内，建议以二档金融工程（量化金融实验班）、金融数学、金融学类为主力填报，一档工商管理类、金融工程（大类）、数据科学与大数据技术 （大类）可冲刺，三档精算学作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<4730名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1703 → 1835 → 3862 → 4129 → 5277, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3415 in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 5277 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 22 students from 2021 to 2023, 24 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 24 in 2026, a slight reduction of 4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive events were found in the reputation data for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranked 91st, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no abnormal increase in application attention; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, all A-class disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength among finance and economics universities, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors in 2024 was assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', with a slight warming compared to 2023, indicating a recovery in willingness to apply for finance and economics majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is about 110,868, with about 79,980 Physics Category candidates, a slight decrease of about 0.5% from 80,421 in 2025, with competition scale basically stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5277, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (intensifying competition), a slight decrease in total candidates, and a slight recovery in popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5230, and a range of 4730–5730.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, including joint bachelor's degree program selection)
- Financial Engineering (Major Category Enrollment) (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology, including joint bachelor's degree program selection)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Category Enrollment) (including Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Project-based Training), including dual bachelor's degree program selection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class)
- Financial Mathematics
- Economics (Honors Bachelor's Experimental Class)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Actuarial Science (including dual bachelor's degree program, experimental class, joint training program selection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (4730–5730), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class), Financial Mathematics, and Finance as the main choices; Tier 1 majors like Business Administration, Financial Engineering (Major Category), and Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Category) can be attempted as reach options; Tier 3 Actuarial Science can serve as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4730), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 471 → 461 → 412 → 606 → 542, with significant fluctuations in recent years: a sharp drop to 606 in 2024, rebounding to 542 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern, with a baseline of about 542 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province's History Category was 18 students from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 19 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 5.6%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable position in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive events were observed in the reputation data for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a below-average level, showing no signs of abnormal increase in application attention; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, all A-class disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength among finance and economics universities, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity assessment for Finance/Economics/General Economics majors was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', showing a slight warming compared to 2023, with a recovery in willingness to apply for finance and economics majors; the total number of Jilin Province 2026 college entrance examination registrations is approximately 110,868, with about 31,043 History Category examinees, basically unchanged from 31,071 in 2025, indicating stable competition scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 542, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (easing competition), the stable total number of examinees, and the slight warming of finance and economics major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 575, ranging from 471 to 679.
